eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Midland, TX; at 12:38 PM on JUN 12, 2026 Effective until 7:38 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The active police incident near 4600 W Wall Street has resolved. There is no longer an active threat to the public. However, the area remains closed to all traffic for an ongoing police investigation. Please continue to avoid the area and use alternate routes. Thank you for your cooperation.
